diseases.name: Scar Tissue Hyperinnervation
diseases.description: Chronic myofascial pain caused by aberrant nerve growth (hyperinnervation) in scar tissue. The CXCL12-CXCR4 chemokine signaling axis drives nociceptor sprouting into fibrotic tissue, leading to persistent pain.

diseases.name: Endometriosis
diseases.description: Chronic pelvic pain from ectopic endometrial tissue growth. CXCL12-CXCR4 axis drives nerve infiltration into endometriotic lesions. Key features: estrogen-dependent proliferation, peritoneal inflammation, nociceptor sensitization.

diseases.name: Alzheimer Disease
diseases.description: Progressive neurodegenerative disease characterized by amyloid-beta plaque accumulation, tau protein tangles, neuroinflammation, and synaptic loss.
